Scope: BACS & SRI options; obligations for large non-residential heating/cooling power; building automation & control by thresholds. Provides an additional path to compliance for MEPS and improved monitoring.
Key Implementing Documents / Authorities: EU Delegated 2020/2155 and Implementing 2020/2156 on SRI; national adoption pathway (planned).

Scope: Ducting/pre-cabling and charging points at new/renovated buildings; streamlining in co-ownerships; fire-safety & accessibility requirements. Integration with building permits and technical regulations.
Key Implementing Documents / Authorities: Several provisions were already introduced in the legislation.
